title: Language Modeling Path
description: Build fluency in Language Modeling inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Masked Language Modeling
steps.summary: A pretraining objective that involves predicting the masked tokens in a sentence. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Language Modeling and Masked Language Models. It opens into Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Masked Language Modeling Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Causal Language Modeling
steps.summary: Causal Language Modeling belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Language Modeling and Language Models. It opens into Causal Language Modeling Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Context Window
steps.summary: Context Window belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Compare it with Sequence Completion and Word Alignment Problem. It opens into Context Window Shrink and Context window budgeting.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.
